title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 79.080 - Mayor, qualifications
text:
79.080.  Mayor, qualifications. — No person shall be mayor unless he be at least twenty-five years of age, a citizen of the United States and a resident of the city at the time of and for at least one year next preceding his election.
(RSMo 1939 § 7102, A.L. 1986 H.B. 1471, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 6952; 1919 § 8403; 1909 § 9305
